V

validate(ByteBuffer) - 接口中的方法 org.graphstream.stream.binary.ByteDecoder
Tells if the buffer contains an event that is ready to be dispatched.
validate(ByteBuffer) - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.stream.netstream.NetStreamDecoder
 
validComponent(int) - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.geom.Vector2
Is i the index of a component ?
validComponent(int) - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.geom.Vector3
Is i the index of a component ?
validIdentifier() - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.stream.file.pajek.PajekParser
 
value - 类中的变量 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet.parser.StyleSheetParser.Number
 
value - 类中的变量 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet.Value
The value.
value() - 注释类型 中的元素 org.graphstream.stream.AnnotatedSink.Bind
Name of the attribute key that triggered the annotated method.
value() - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet.parser.StyleSheetParser
 
value(String) - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.stream.file.gml.GMLParser
A value for a key, either a number, a string or a recursive list of key-values.
Value - org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet中的类
A value and the units of the value.
Value(StyleConstants.Units, double) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet.Value
New value.
Value(Value) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet.Value
New copy of another value.

Values - org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet中的类
Several values and the units of these values.
Values(StyleConstants.Units, double...) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet.Values
New value set with one initial value.
Values(Value) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet.Values
New set of one value.
Values(Values) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet.Values
New copy of another value set.
VDOP - 枚举 中的枚举常量 org.graphstream.stream.file.FileSourceGPX.GPXConstants.Balise
 
Vector2 - org.graphstream.ui.geom中的类
 
Vector2() - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.ui.geom.Vector2
New zero vector.
Vector2(double, double) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.ui.geom.Vector2
New (x,y) vector.
Vector2(Point2) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.ui.geom.Vector2
New vector copy of point.
Vector2(Point2, Point2) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.ui.geom.Vector2
 
Vector2(Vector2) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.ui.geom.Vector2
New vector copy of other.
Vector3 - org.graphstream.ui.geom中的类
A three component vector made of doubles.
Vector3() - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.ui.geom.Vector3
New zero vector.
Vector3(double, double, double) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.ui.geom.Vector3
New (x,y,z) vector.
Vector3(Point3) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.ui.geom.Vector3
New vector copy of point.
Vector3(Vector3) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.ui.geom.Vector3
New vector copy of other.
VerboseSink - org.graphstream.util中的类
A sink that can be used to display event in a PrintStream like System.out.
VerboseSink() - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.util.VerboseSink
Create a new verbose sink using System.out.
VerboseSink(PrintStream) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.util.VerboseSink
Create a new verbose sink.
VerboseSink.EventType - org.graphstream.util中的枚举
Enumeration defining type of events.
VERSION - 枚举 中的枚举常量 org.graphstream.stream.file.FileSourceGEXF.GEXFConstants.GEXFAttribute
 
VERSION - 枚举 中的枚举常量 org.graphstream.stream.file.FileSourceGPX.GPXConstants.GPXAttribute
 
VERSION - 类中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.file.gexf.GEXF
 
vertex() - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.stream.file.pajek.PajekParser
 
vertices() - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.stream.file.pajek.PajekParser
 
VERTICES - 接口中的静态变量 org.graphstream.stream.file.pajek.PajekParserConstants
RegularExpression Id.
VGA - 枚举 中的枚举常量 org.graphstream.stream.file.images.Resolutions
 
View - org.graphstream.ui.view中的接口
A view on a graphic graph.
viewClosed(String) - 接口中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.view.ViewerListener
 
Viewer - org.graphstream.ui.view中的类
Set of views on a graphic graph.
Viewer() - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.ui.view.Viewer
 
Viewer.CloseFramePolicy - org.graphstream.ui.view中的枚举
What to do when a view frame is closed.
Viewer.ThreadingModel - org.graphstream.ui.view中的枚举
How does the viewer synchronise its internal graphic graph with the graph displayed.
ViewerListener - org.graphstream.ui.view中的接口
Listener for specific viewer events.
ViewerPipe - org.graphstream.ui.view中的类
Shell around a proxy pipe coming from the viewer allowing to put viewer listeners on a viewer that runs in a distinct thread.
ViewerPipe(String, ProxyPipe) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.ui.view.ViewerPipe
A shell around a pipe coming from a viewer in another thread.
viewport - 类中的变量 org.graphstream.ui.view.util.GraphMetrics
The view port size.
VISIBILITY - 接口中的静态变量 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet.parser.StyleSheetParserConstants
RegularExpression Id.
VISIBILITYMODE - 接口中的静态变量 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet.parser.StyleSheetParserConstants
RegularExpression Id.
visMode() - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet.parser.StyleSheetParser
 
VIZ - 枚举 中的枚举常量 org.graphstream.stream.file.gexf.GEXFElement.Extension
 
VSQUARELINE - 枚举 中的枚举常量 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet.StyleConstants.Shape
 
VSQUARELINE - 接口中的静态变量 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.stylesheet.parser.StyleSheetParserConstants
RegularExpression Id.
